name: chizunurie-mobile
description: Capacitor wrapper (remote URL) for the chizunurie web app

scripts.apk: cap sync android && cd android && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.bundle: cap sync android && cd android && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" ./gradlew bundleRelease
